hero.badge: Built from real hotel operations · Structured · Ready to use
hero.title: Operational Clarity for High-End Hospitality
hero.subtitle: Documented standards, clear procedures, and practical tools built from real hotel operations and designed for immediate use across your property.

problem.title: The Challenge
problem.text: Most high-end hotels share the same operational challenges: inconsistent standards, undocumented processes, and the constant pressure of staff turnover. LuxOps provides structured SOPs, practical tools, and operational support to help teams perform consistently.
problem.point1_text: Guest experience varies with staff changes. Without documented standards, quality becomes unpredictable.
problem.point2_text: When processes exist only in people's heads, every departure is a risk. Documented methods protect what your team has built.
problem.point3_text: Onboarding without structured guides is slow and inconsistent. Clear documentation reduces integration time and limits errors.

solution.title: The LuxOps Approach
solution.text: We turn real operational experience into structured processes, practical playbooks, and property-specific support so your teams deliver consistent service at every stage of the guest journey.

offers.title: Our Offerings
offers.digital_desc: Ready-to-use playbooks and Notion templates. Purchase, download, and put to work immediately.
offers.audit_desc: In-depth quality audit and custom process creation tailored to your property's needs.
offers.training_desc: Practical training sessions designed for your team and property. Half-day or full-day formats available.

social_proof.title: Methods built and applied across demanding hotel environments
social_proof.subtitle: Testimonials coming soon.

cta_section.title: Ready to Strengthen Your Operations?
cta_section.text: Whether you need a practical tool or a structured review of your operations, we can help.

playbooks_page.title: Operational Playbooks
playbooks_page.subtitle: Documented SOPs built from real hotel operations. Each playbook is available in your preferred language.
playbooks_page.coming_soon_text: HR, Planning, Admin modules in development.
playbooks_page.playbook1_desc: Check-in/out procedures, guest communication protocols, concierge standards, and complaint handling methods.
playbooks_page.playbook2_desc: Room inspection checklists, linen management, turndown service protocols, and deep cleaning procedures.
playbooks_page.playbook3_desc: Restaurant service standards, bar operations, room service protocols, and banquet service procedures.
playbooks_page.playbook4_desc: Treatment protocols, therapist standards, booking management, and wellness programme structure.

notion_page.title: Notion Templates
notion_page.subtitle: Ready-to-use operational management workspaces, structured for hotel teams.
notion_page.base_desc: A complete Notion workspace for hotel operations management. Includes dashboards, checklists, task management, and reporting templates for all key departments.
notion_page.custom_desc: Full customisation of the Notion workspace to match your property, brand standards, and operational workflows.

audit_page.title: Quality Audit
audit_page.subtitle: An in-depth 2-day operational audit to identify gaps and build a clear improvement roadmap.
audit_page.step1_desc: Review of existing documentation, standards, and operational context.
audit_page.step2_desc: 2-day review across all departments. 100+ evaluation criteria.
audit_page.step3_desc: Detailed findings, gap analysis, and priority recommendations.
audit_page.step4_desc: 40-60 page report with a structured improvement roadmap.
audit_page.cta_subtitle: Have a property you'd like us to review? Let's discuss what you need.

process_page.title: Custom Process Creation
process_page.subtitle: Complete process creation for any hotel department, aligned with your brand standards and operational structure.
process_page.desc: We create complete SOPs for any hotel department, formatted for print or Notion. We can build from your existing documentation or develop new processes from scratch.

training_page.title: On-Property Training
training_page.subtitle: Practical operational training designed for your team and property.
training_page.cta_title: Looking to train your team on-site?

about_page.title: About LuxOps
about_page.subtitle: Structured operational methods from high-end hotel environments, available to every property.
about_page.story_p1: LuxOps was built from years of operational experience across high-end properties and independent hotel groups.
about_page.story_p2: Through managing complex, multi-department hotel operations, we developed structured procedures, SOPs, and operating methods drawn from environments where consistent service is non-negotiable.
about_page.story_p3: The logic was straightforward: high-end hotels share the same operational challenges. No property should have to build everything from scratch. LuxOps packages tested, structured methods so teams can implement them quickly and focus on what matters most: their guests.
about_page.v1_desc: We hold ourselves to the standards expected at the top of the industry.
about_page.v2_desc: Complex operations become simple when documented with precision and care.
about_page.v3_desc: Every recommendation is actionable, rooted in real operational experience.
